title: CraftPlanet
description: This is a client side performance and utility mod!
body:
# CraftPlanet
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/craftplanet?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/craftplanet?style=for-the-badge) ![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/Blonicx/CraftPlanet?display_timestamp=author&style=for-the-badge&logo=github)

## What is CraftPlanet?
CraftPlanet is a Client Mod that adds these Features

<details>
<summary>KeyBinds</summary>
  
  **KEYBOARD_B** - Copy Coordinates.
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Utility</summary>
  
  **Durability Tooltip** - Shows the Item Durability

  **Time Text** - Shows a Text in the PauseMenu with the current Time

  **Loner Chat History** - Up to 10000 messages in the History

  **Custom Capes** - Load a Custom Cape from you disc
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Performance</summary>

  
<details>
<summary>General & Patricle</summary>

**disableWeatherEffects** - If enabled, no WeatherEffects get shown.

**FPS Limiter** - Limits the Fps when you tab out of mc

**maxParticles** - The maximum amount of Particles.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Render Distance</summary>

**maxSignTextRenderDistance** - The maximum distnace of Sign Texts to render.

**maxItemFrameRenderDistance** - The maximum distnace of Item Frames to render.

**maxEntityRenderDistance** - The maximum distnace of Entities to render.

**maxBlockEntityRenderDistance** - The maximum distnace of Block Entities to render.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Implementations</summary>

**QuickPack** + Custom lazy-file-loading 

**Server Ping Fixer**

</details>
  
</details>

## Installation Guide
Download the File from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftplanet) and put it in the Fabric Mod Directory or install it through the Modrinth Desktop App.
